title: NATURE WALKING
description: A small modpack for hiking & camping. Beautiful nature, social interactions.
body:
An interesting build designed to transfer the camping experience to Minecraft both alone and in the company of friends!

# About

- **Slow walking mode** for a more atmospheric travel and location exploration experience
- **Large** number of biomes provided by the Biomes O Plenty mod
- Compatibility with Essential
- Optimized reconfigured MakeUp shaders
- Suitable for weak PCs
- Voice chat with fun animations and sound physics
- Nice atmosphere
- Cold and thirst system
